label: Work site loot thing
description: One entry in a site part's loot table. Defines a ThingDef that can be looted from the site and a relative selection weight.

thing.label: Thing
thing.description: ThingDef that may be awarded as loot from this site part.

weight.label: Weight
weight.description: Relative selection weight for this loot entry. Higher values make this item more likely to be chosen.
